---
title: "IATcode"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-14"
---

```{r package}

library(GPArotation) 
library(corrplot)  
library(dplyr)
library(psych)
library(tidyverse)
library(openxlsx)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(showtext)
showtext_auto() 
library(scales)
library(lavaan)
library(semPlot)
library(irr)
```

```{r scoring of argument writing}

data <- read.xlsx('WritingICC.xlsx')

psych::ICC(data[,c("rater1_claim","rater2_claim","rater3_claim")]) #0.84
psych::ICC(data[,c("rater1_evidence","rater2_evidence","rater3_evidence")]) #0.73
psych::ICC(data[,c("rater1_elaboration","rater2_elaboration","rater3_elaboration")]) #0.70
psych::ICC(data[,c("rater1_structure","rater2_structure","rater3_structure")]) #0.72
psych::ICC(data[,c("rater1_fairness","rater2_fairness","rater3_fairness")]) #0.74


summary_table <- data %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      c(claim, evidence, elaboration, structure, fairness),
      list(
        mean = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd   = ~ sd(.x,   na.rm = TRUE),
        min  = ~ min(.x,  na.rm = TRUE),
        max  = ~ max(.x,  na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = c("metric", "stat"),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = stat,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  arrange(metric)

print(summary_table)


```

```{r position-change reasons}

#-----labeling consistency------

data <- read.xlsx('reasons.xlsx', sheet = 'matched')

data[, 3:29] <- lapply(data[, 3:29], function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), 0, x))

data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('Prior_rater1', 'Prior_rater2', 'Prior_rater3'), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('Prior_rater1', 'Prior_rater2', 'Prior_rater3')) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('Prior_rater1', 'Prior_rater2', 'Prior_rater3')) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('Prior_rater1',"Prior_rater2","Prior_rater3")]) #0.93


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('New_rater1',"New_rater2","New_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('New_rater1',"New_rater2","New_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('New_rater1',"New_rater2","New_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('New_rater1',"New_rater2","New_rater3")]) #0.87


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('High_rater1',"High_rater2","High_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('High_rater1',"High_rater2","High_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('High_rater1',"High_rater2","High_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('High_rater1',"High_rater2","High_rater3")]) #0.84


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('Low_rater1',"Low_rater2","Low_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('Low_rater1',"Low_rater2","Low_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('Low_rater1',"Low_rater2","Low_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('Low_rater1',"Low_rater2","Low_rater3")]) #0.90


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('Consist_rater1',"Consist_rater2","Consist_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('Consist_rater1',"Consist_rater2","Consist_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('Consist_rater1',"Consist_rater2","Consist_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('Consist_rater1',"Consist_rater2","Consist_rater3")]) #0.88


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('Endorse_rater1',"Endorse_rater2","Endorse_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('Endorse_rater1',"Endorse_rater2","Endorse_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('Endorse_rater1',"Endorse_rater2","Endorse_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('Endorse_rater1',"Endorse_rater2","Endorse_rater3")]) #0.82


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('Direct_rater1',"Direct_rater2","Direct_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('Direct_rater1',"Direct_rater2","Direct_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('Direct_rater1',"Direct_rater2","Direct_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('Direct_rater1',"Direct_rater2","Direct_rater3")]) #0.76


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('Indirect_rater1',"Indirect_rater2","Indirect_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('Indirect_rater1',"Indirect_rater2","Indirect_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('Indirect_rater1',"Indirect_rater2","Indirect_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('Indirect_rater1',"Indirect_rater2","Indirect_rater3")]) #0.68


data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(c('Invalid_rater1',"Invalid_rater2","Invalid_rater3"), 
                ~ ifelse(rowSums(across(c('Invalid_rater1',"Invalid_rater2","Invalid_rater3")) == 1) == 1 & 
                         rowSums(across(c('Invalid_rater1',"Invalid_rater2","Invalid_rater3")) == 0) == 2, 0, .), 
                .names = '{col}'))

kappam.fleiss(data[,c('Invalid_rater1',"Invalid_rater2","Invalid_rater3")]) #0.81


#-----summarize to final coding-----

data$Prior <- ifelse(data$Prior_rater1 + data$Prior_rater2 + data$Prior_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$New <- ifelse(data$New_rater1 + data$New_rater2 + data$New_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$High <- ifelse(data$High_rater1 + data$High_rater2 + data$High_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$Low <- ifelse(data$Low_rater1 + data$Low_rater2 + data$Low_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$Consist <- ifelse(data$Consist_rater1 + data$Consist_rater2 + data$Consist_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$Endorse <- ifelse(data$Endorse_rater1 + data$Endorse_rater2 + data$Endorse_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$Direct <- ifelse(data$Direct_rater1 + data$Direct_rater2 + data$Direct_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$Indirect <- ifelse(data$Indirect_rater1 + data$Indirect_rater2 + data$Indirect_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)
data$Invalid <- ifelse(data$Invalid_rater1 + data$Invalid_rater2 + data$Invalid_rater3 >= 2, 1, 0)


```

```{r description of indicators}

#-----pass rate----

data <- read.xlsx('CFAdata.xlsx',sheet ='general')

columns <- c("M1Q1", "M2Q1", "M3Q1", "M4Q1", "M5Q1", "M8Q1",
              "M2Q2", "M4Q2", "M6Q2", "M7Q2", "M8Q2","total",
             'Claim','Evidence','Elaboration','Structure','Fairness',
             'Mean_number_new_evidence','Mean_wordcount_new_evidence')

results <- data.frame(
  mean = round(sapply(data[columns], mean), 2),
  sd = round(sapply(data[columns], sd), 2),
  min = round(sapply(data[columns], min), 2),
  max = round(sapply(data[columns], max), 2)
)

print(results)


p1 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = total)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, fill = "lightgray", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = " ",
       x = "Validity score of position-change reasons",
       y = "Frequency") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 65), breaks = seq(0, 65, 10)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-7, 20), breaks = seq(-7, 20, 4)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )


p2 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = Mean_number_new_evidence)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.2, fill = "lightgray", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = " ",
       x = "Mean word count of newly added evidence",
       y = "Frequency") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 110), breaks = seq(0, 110, 20)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )


p3 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = Mean_wordcount_new_evidence)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth =120, fill = "lightgray", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = " ",
       x = "Mean word count of newly added evidence ",
       y = "Frequency") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 120), breaks = seq(0, 120, 20)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )

grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,ncol=3)

```

```{r ability estimation}

#------IAT-----

CFAdata <- read.xlsx("CFAdata.xlsx",sheet='general')

IATmodel <- '
  f1 =~ M1Q1 + M2Q1 + M3Q1 + M4Q1 + M5Q1
  f2 =~ M2Q2 + M4Q2 + M6Q2 + M7Q2 + total
  f3 =~ Claim + Evidence + Elaboration + Structure + Fairness + Mean_number_new_evidence +	Mean_wordcount_new_evidence'

fit <- cfa(IATmodel, data = CFAdata)

summary(fit, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

factor_scores <- predict(fit)

CFAdata$f_single <- factor_scores[,1]
CFAdata$f_between <- factor_scores[,2]
CFAdata$f_integ <- factor_scores[,3]

cor.test(CFAdata$f_single, CFAdata$f_between, method = "pearson") #0.445 p<0.001
cor.test(CFAdata$f_single, CFAdata$f_integ, method = "pearson") #0.274 p<0.001
cor.test(CFAdata$f_between, CFAdata$f_integ, method = "pearson")  #0.006 p=0.915


#----TSA-----

alldata <- read.xlsx('criterion.xlsx')

modelTSA <- '
  TSA =~ t1 + t2 + t3 + t4 + t6 + t7 + t8 + t9 + t10 + t11 + t12 + t13 + t14 + t15 + t17 + t18' # -t16 -t5

stu <- alldata[1:355, ]

fit <- cfa(modelTSA, data = stu)

summary(fit, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

factor_scores <- predict(fit, newdata = alldata)
alldata$f_TSA <- factor_scores[, 1]

f_TSA_general <- alldata$f_TSA[alldata$group == "general"]
f_TSA_debater <- alldata$f_TSA[alldata$group == "debater"]
t.test(f_TSA_debater, f_TSA_general)
cohens_d(f_TSA_debater, f_TSA_general)

#----EW-----

modelEW <- '
  f_EW =~ P1 + P2 + P3 + P4 + P5 + P6 + P7 + P8'

fit <- cfa(modelEW, data = stu)

summary(fit, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

factor_scores <- predict(fit, newdata = alldata)
alldata$f_EW <- factor_scores
colnames(alldata$f_EW) <- 'f_EW'

f_EW_general <- alldata$f_EW[alldata$group == "general"]
f_EW_debater <- alldata$f_EW[alldata$group == "debater"]
t.test(f_EW_debater, f_EW_general)
cohens_d(f_EW_debater, f_EW_general)

stats_comparison <- alldata %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    f_TSA_mean = round(mean(f_TSA, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f_TSA_min = round(min(f_TSA, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f_TSA_max = round(max(f_TSA, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    
    f_EW_mean = round(mean(f_EW, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f_EW_min = round(min(f_EW, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f_EW_max = round(max(f_EW, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  )

#---reasoning----

modelREA <- '
  f_REA1 =~ r1 + r2 + r3 + r4 
  f_REA2 =~ r5 + r6 + r7
  f_REA3 =~ r8 + r9 + r10'

fit <- cfa(modelREA, data = stu)

summary(fit, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

factor_scores <- predict(fit, newdata = alldata)


```

```{r Convergent and discriminant validity}

data <- read.xlsx('CFAdata.xlsx',sheet='general')

vars <- c('f_single','f_between','f_integ','f_TSA','f_EW','f_REA1','f_REA2','f_REA3')
cor_data <- data[, vars]

cor_matrix <- round(cor(cor_data, use = "complete.obs"), 3)

cor_test <- corr.test(cor_data, use = "complete")

p_matrix <- round(cor_test$p, 3)

p_matrix

```

```{r known-group validty}

library(effectsize)

CFAdata <- read.xlsx("CFAdata.xlsx",sheet='general')
debater <- read.xlsx("CFAdata.xlsx",sheet='debater')

IATmodel <- '
  f1 =~ M1Q1 + M2Q1 + M3Q1 + M4Q1 + M5Q1
  f2 =~ M2Q2 + M4Q2 + M6Q2 + M7Q2 + total
  f3 =~ Claim + Evidence + Elaboration + Structure + Fairness + Mean_number_new_evidence +	Mean_wordcount_new_evidence'

fit <- cfa(IATmodel, data = CFAdata)

summary(fit, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

factor_scores <- predict(fit, newdata = debater)

debater$f_single <- factor_scores[,1]
debater$f_between <- factor_scores[,2]
debater$f_integ <- factor_scores[,3]

diff <- read.xlsx("CFAdata.xlsx",sheet='difference')

f1_normal <- diff %>% filter(group == "normal") %>% pull(f_single)
f1_debater <- diff %>% filter(group == "debater") %>% pull(f_single)
t.test(f1_debater, f1_normal)
cohens_d(f1_debater, f1_normal)

f2_normal <- diff %>% filter(group == "normal") %>% pull(f_between)
f2_debater <- diff %>% filter(group == "debater") %>% pull(f_between)
t.test(f2_debater, f2_normal)
cohens_d(f2_debater, f2_normal)

f3_normal <- diff %>% filter(group == "normal") %>% pull(f_integ)
f3_debater <- diff %>% filter(group == "debater") %>% pull(f_integ)
t.test(f3_debater, f3_normal)
cohens_d(f3_debater, f3_normal)

stats_comparison <- diff %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    f1_mean = round(mean(f_single, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f1_min = round(min(f_single, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f1_max = round(max(f_single, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    
    f2_mean = round(mean(f_between, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f2_min = round(min(f_between, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f2_max = round(max(f_between, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    
    f3_mean = round(mean(f_integ, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f3_min = round(min(f_integ, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    f3_max = round(max(f_integ, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  )

t(stats_comparison)


```

```{r LPA}

library(mclust)
library(tidyLPA)
library(plotly)
library(reshape2)

data <- read.xlsx('CFAdata.xlsx',sheet='general')

selected_vars <- data[, c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ")]

#------cluster=2--------

results <- estimate_profiles(
  selected_vars,
  n_profiles = 2
)

fit_indices <- get_fit(results)
print(fit_indices)

profile_estimates <- get_estimates(results)
profile_means <- profile_estimates %>%
  filter(Category == "Means") %>%
  select(Parameter, Estimate, Class)

classified_data <- get_data(results)

profile_counts <- table(classified_data$Class)
profile_proportions <- prop.table(profile_counts)
print(round(profile_proportions * 100, 2))

data$profile <- classified_data$Class

profile_means_long2 <- profile_means %>%
  rename(Variable = Parameter, Mean = Estimate)

profile_means_long2$Variable <- factor(profile_means_long2$Variable, 
                                      levels = c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ"))

p2 <- ggplot(profile_means_long2, aes(x = Variable, y = Mean, group = Class, color = as.factor(Class))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "f_single" = "single", 
    "f_between" = "inter-argument", 
    "f_integ" = "integration"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.85, 0.4), breaks = seq(-0.85, 0.4, by = 0.2)) +
  scale_color_discrete(name = " ", 
                      labels = c("1" = "C1 (79%)", 
                                "2" = "C2 (21%)")) +
  labs(title = "2 Clusters",
       y = "Mean ability",
       x = NULL) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
  )

#------cluster=3--------

results <- estimate_profiles(
  selected_vars,
  n_profiles = 3
)

fit_indices <- get_fit(results)
print(fit_indices)

profile_estimates <- get_estimates(results)
profile_means <- profile_estimates %>%
  filter(Category == "Means") %>%
  select(Parameter, Estimate, Class)

classified_data <- get_data(results)
profile_counts <- table(classified_data$Class)
profile_proportions <- prop.table(profile_counts)
print(round(profile_proportions * 100, 2))

data$profile <- classified_data$Class

profile_means_long3 <- profile_means %>%
  rename(Variable = Parameter, Mean = Estimate)

profile_means_long3$Variable <- factor(profile_means_long3$Variable, 
                                      levels = c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ"))

p3 <- ggplot(profile_means_long3, aes(x = Variable, y = Mean, group = Class, color = as.factor(Class))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "f_single" = "single", 
    "f_between" = "inter-argument", 
    "f_integ" = "integration"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.85, 0.4), breaks = seq(-0.85, 0.4, by = 0.2)) +
  scale_color_discrete(name = " ", 
                      labels = c("1" = "C1 (9%)", 
                                "2" = "C2 (24%)", 
                                "3" = "C3 (67%)")) +
  labs(title = "3 Clusters",
       y = "Mean ability",
       x = NULL) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
  )


#------cluster=5--------

results <- estimate_profiles(
  selected_vars,
  n_profiles = 5
)

fit_indices <- get_fit(results)
print(fit_indices)

profile_estimates <- get_estimates(results)
profile_means <- profile_estimates %>%
  filter(Category == "Means") %>%
  select(Parameter, Estimate, Class)

classified_data <- get_data(results)

profile_counts <- table(classified_data$Class)
profile_proportions <- prop.table(profile_counts)
print(round(profile_proportions * 100, 2))

data$profile <- classified_data$Class

profile_means_long5 <- profile_means %>%
  rename(Variable = Parameter, Mean = Estimate)

profile_means_long5$Variable <- factor(profile_means_long5$Variable, 
                                      levels = c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ"))

p5 <- ggplot(profile_means_long5, aes(x = Variable, y = Mean, group = Class, color = as.factor(Class))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "f_single" = "single", 
    "f_between" = "inter-argument", 
    "f_integ" = "integration"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.85, 0.4), breaks = seq(-0.85, 0.4, by = 0.2)) +
  scale_color_discrete(name = " ", 
                      labels = c("1" = "C1 (8%)", 
                                "2" = "C2 (22%)", 
                                "3" = "C3 (28%)", 
                                "4" = "C4 (27%)",
                                "5" = "C5 (15%)")) +
  labs(title = "5 Clusters",
       y = "Mean ability",
       x = NULL) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
  )


#------cluster=4--------

results <- estimate_profiles(
  selected_vars,
  n_profiles = 4
)

fit_indices <- get_fit(results)
print(fit_indices)

profile_estimates <- get_estimates(results)

profile_means <- profile_estimates %>%
  filter(Category == "Means") %>%
  select(Parameter, Estimate, Class)

classified_data <- get_data(results)

profile_counts <- table(classified_data$Class)
profile_proportions <- prop.table(profile_counts)
print(round(profile_proportions * 100, 2))

data$profile <- classified_data$Class

profile_means_long4 <- profile_means %>%
  rename(Variable = Parameter, Mean = Estimate)

profile_means_long4$Variable <- factor(profile_means_long4$Variable, 
                                      levels = c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ"))

profile_means_long4$Class <- ifelse(profile_means_long4$Class == 1, "temp",
                                   ifelse(profile_means_long4$Class == 2, 1, profile_means_long4$Class))

profile_means_long4$Class <- ifelse(profile_means_long4$Class == "temp", 2, profile_means_long4$Class)

profile_means_long4$Class <- as.factor(profile_means_long4$Class)

p4 <- ggplot(profile_means_long4, aes(x = Variable, y = Mean, group = Class, color = as.factor(Class))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "f_single" = "single", 
    "f_between" = "inter-argument", 
    "f_integ" = "integration"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.85, 0.4), breaks = seq(-0.85, 0.4, by = 0.2)) +
  scale_color_discrete(name = " ", 
                      labels = c("1" = "C1", 
                                "2" = "C2", 
                                "3" = "C3", 
                                "4" = "C4")) +
  labs(title = "4 Clusters",
       y = "Mean ability",
       x = NULL) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
  )


stats_table <- data %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    f_TSA_mean = mean(f_TSA, na.rm = TRUE),
    f_EW_mean = mean(f_EW, na.rm = TRUE),
    f_REA1_mean = mean(f_REA1, na.rm = TRUE),
    f_REA2_mean = mean(f_REA2, na.rm = TRUE),
    f_REA3_mean = mean(f_REA3, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

View(as.data.frame(round(stats_table,2)))


data$profile <- as.factor(data$profile)

anova_result <- aov(f_TSA ~ profile, data = data)
summary(anova_result)
TukeyHSD(anova_result)

anova_result <- aov(f_EW ~ profile, data = data)
summary(anova_result)
TukeyHSD(anova_result)

anova_result <- aov(f_REA1 ~ profile, data = data)
summary(anova_result)
TukeyHSD(anova_result)

anova_result <- aov(f_REA2 ~ profile, data = data)
summary(anova_result)
TukeyHSD(anova_result)

anova_result <- aov(f_REA3 ~ profile, data = data)
summary(anova_result)
TukeyHSD(anova_result)


# add debaters to do LPA

newdata <- read.xlsx('CFAdata.xlsx',sheet='difference')
debater <- newdata[, c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ")]

results <- estimate_profiles(
  debater,
  n_profiles = 4
)

fit_indices <- get_fit(results)
print(fit_indices)

profile_estimates <- get_estimates(results)
profile_means <- profile_estimates %>%
  filter(Category == "Means") %>%
  select(Parameter, Estimate, Class)

classified_data <- get_data(results)

profile_counts <- table(classified_data$Class)
profile_proportions <- prop.table(profile_counts)
print(round(profile_proportions * 100, 2))

debater$profile <- classified_data$Class

profile_means_long <- profile_means %>%
  rename(Variable = Parameter, Mean = Estimate)

profile_means_long$Variable <- factor(profile_means_long$Variable, 
                                      levels = c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ"))

custom_colors <- c("2" = "#FA8072","4" = "#7FBC41", "3" = "#4DBBD5", "1" = "#B983FF")

p <- ggplot(profile_means_long, aes(x = Variable, y = Mean, group = Class, color = as.factor(Class))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "f_single" = "f_single", 
    "f_between" = "f_between", 
    "f_integ" = "f_integ"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.85, 0.6), breaks = seq(-0.85, 0.6, by = 0.2)) +
  # match color
  scale_color_manual(name = " ", 
                    values = custom_colors,
                    labels = c("1" = "disadvantage", 
                              "2" = "advantage", 
                              "3" = "balance-weak f_between", 
                              "4" = "balance-strong f_between")) +
  labs(title = "general + debaters",
       y = "mean ability",
       x = NULL) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",  
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
  )

results <- estimate_profiles(
  selected_vars,
  n_profiles = 4
)

fit_indices <- get_fit(results)
print(fit_indices)

profile_estimates <- get_estimates(results)
profile_means <- profile_estimates %>%
  filter(Category == "Means") %>%
  select(Parameter, Estimate, Class)

classified_data <- get_data(results)

profile_counts <- table(classified_data$Class)
profile_proportions <- prop.table(profile_counts)
print(round(profile_proportions * 100, 2))

data$profile <- classified_data$Class

profile_means_long4 <- profile_means %>%
  rename(Variable = Parameter, Mean = Estimate)

profile_means_long4$Variable <- factor(profile_means_long4$Variable, 
                                      levels = c("f_single", "f_between", "f_integ"))


# compare proportion of each profiles (debater vs general)

row_percent <- round(prop.table(tab, 1) * 100, 1)

result <- matrix("", nrow = nrow(tab), ncol = ncol(tab))
for (i in 1:nrow(tab)) {
  for (j in 1:ncol(tab)) {
    result[i, j] <- paste0(tab[i, j], " (", row_percent[i, j], "%)")
  }
}

rownames(result) <- rownames(tab)
colnames(result) <- colnames(tab)

print(result)


```
